title: WOS Studio (Authoring) — Terminology Map / Canonical Term
description: CanonicalTerm registry + workspace-scoped TerminologyMap per studio-authoring/specs/terminology-and-canonical-vocabulary.md. CanonicalTerm carries the canonical IRI + plain-English projection for every Studio entity and every cross-workspace shared concept. TerminologyMap entries map workspace-local names to canonical IRIs (with synonyms, confidence, plain-English projection). Adopts W3C DPV (Data Privacy Vocabulary) IRIs for sensitivity classification (replaces prior hand-rolled `pii|phi|restricted` enum).
$comment: Promotion status (Stage-3, 2026-05-01): MVP shape; CanonicalTerm registry is initially per-workspace; cross-workspace federation via FederationLink is reserved (ws.x-federation slot).

x-lm.intent: Document type marker for the Studio TerminologyMap

canonicalTerms.description: CanonicalTerm registry entries. Each carries the canonical IRI, display name, definition, domain, authoritative source, plain-English projection, and DPV sensitivity (when applicable).

entries.description: TerminologyMap entries. Each maps a workspace-local name to a CanonicalTerm IRI with optional synonyms + confidence + reviewer rationale.

iri.description: Canonical IRI for the term. Open vocabulary — accepts DPV IRIs (`dpv:HealthData`), USDA/agency IRIs (`usda-snap:HouseholdIncome`), Studio meta IRIs (`studio-meta:NoticeRequirement`), etc.

authoritativeSource.description: URL or citation of the authoritative source for this term.

parentTerm.description: Parent term IRI if this term is a sub-term.

dataType.description: FEL data type when this term names a DataElement.

studioPlainEnglishProjection.description: Plain-English label used in reviewer UIs (Sarah's vocabulary concern as a structural artifact).

dpvSensitivity.description: DPV (Data Privacy Vocabulary) sensitivity IRI. Open vocabulary; accepts any IRI under the DPV namespace.

canonicalIri.description: Canonical IRI this localName resolves to.
